title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
